subject: [PATCH v2 3/9] nfs/localio: fix ref leak on nfs_uuid_add_file failure

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch fixes a reference leak in the NFS/localio code by releasing caller-owned file and net references when nfs_uuid_add_file() fails due to racing with nfs_uuid_put(). The fix involves using an RCU pointer to safely drop these references, allowing the slot pair and underlying struct file, dentry, and inode to be properly cleaned up. This patch addresses a previously fixed issue that was reintroduced in a later commit.
